div.h3: Alternative architecture achieving 2-3x throughput vs std::unordered_map

g.title: Structure optimized for Cache Line (64B) prefetching and SIMD loads
1 byte per slot. SSE loads 16 bytes, AVX loads 32 bytes.

ul.li: Advantage: Eliminates branch mispredictions for empty/deleted slots.
